content: Phase 1: Backend - Automatische Scans (bandit, pip-audit, semgrep)
Phase 2: Frontend - Automatische Scans (yarn audit, ESLint security rules)
Phase 3: Manuelle Backend-Review (IDOR, AuthZ, Secrets, Upload, Rate-Limit, CSRF/CORS, XSS-sink)
Phase 4: Manuelle Frontend-Review (dangerouslySetInnerHTML, Token-Storage, Unvalidated Redirects, Link-Safety)
